Customise Consent Preferences

Customise your consent preferences for Cookie Categories and advertising tracking preferences for Purposes & Features and Vendors below. You can give granular consent for each and . Most vendors require explicit consent for personal data processing, while some rely on legitimate interest. However, you have the right to object to their use of legitimate interest. Additionally, please note that your preferences regarding purposes and vendors are saved in a cookie named 'euconsent' on your device and may be retained for up to 730 days to remember your choices.

Cookie Categories

We use cookies to help you navigate efficiently and perform certain functions. You will find detailed information about all cookies under each consent category below.

The cookies that are categorised as "Necessary" are stored on your browser as they are essential for enabling the basic functionalities of the site. ... 

Always Active

Necessary cookies are required to enable the basic features of this site, such as providing secure log-in or adjusting your consent preferences. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable data.

Functional cookies help perform certain functionalities like sharing the content of the website on social media platforms, collecting feedback, and other third-party features.

Analytical cookies are used to understand how visitors interact with the website. These cookies help provide information on metrics such as the number of visitors, bounce rate, traffic source, etc.

Performance cookies are used to understand and analyse the key performance indexes of the website which helps in delivering a better user experience for the visitors.

Advertisement cookies are used to provide visitors with customised advertisements based on the pages you visited previously and to analyse the effectiveness of the ad campaigns.

Free, online percentage calculators

Shopping sales? Try '20% off'...|

What Can You Calculate?

  • Have a coupon — e.g. '20% off'? See what you'll actually pay at the register. — Apply My Coupon
  • Shopping the clearance rack? Find out exactly how much you save. — See My Savings
  • In-store shopping? Calculate the total price with Sales Tax. — Calculate Total Price
  • Dining out or ordering in? Calculate the perfect tip for your server. — Calculate My Tip
  • Closing a deal? Calculate your estimated commission check. — See My Commission
  • Facing a rent hike? Calculate the exact percentage increase. — See % Change
  • Got a raise at work? See how much your new paycheck will be. — See My New Pay
  • Need the pre-tax price? Instantly calculate the original price before sales tax was added. — Find Pre-Tax Price
  • Finals coming up? Find the minimum score you need to pass. — Calculate My Score

Percentage Change Calculator

What is the percentage change from the Original value to the New value?

Selected Practical Use Example

  • Performance Improvement: Monthly sales leads improving from 70 [Original] to 84 [New] represents what percentage improvement [Change%]? 20%

Contextual hints will appear here as you calculate

Calculate the percentage difference between two values to determine increases or decreases.

  • Inflation Rate: A concert ticket rising from $100 [Original] to $103 [New] represents what inflation rate [Change%]? 3%
  • Performance Improvement: Monthly sales leads improving from 70 [Original] to 84 [New] represents what percentage improvement [Change%]? 20%
  • Revenue Growth: Small business revenue growing from $1,000,000 [Original] to $1,200,000 [New] represents what percentage growth [Change%]? 20%
  • Salary Change: A Big Box store manager's salary increase from $50,000 [Original] to $54,000 [New] represents what percentage raise [Change%]? 8%
  • Stock Price Change: Streaming service stock going from $50 [Original] to $75 [New] represents what percentage change [Change%]? 50% increase
  • Website Traffic Change: A drop in online craft shop visits from 10,000 [Original] to 8,500 [New] represents what percentage change [Change%]? 15% decrease
  • Weight Loss: Weight dropping from 180 [Original] lbs to 162 [New] lbs on a Keto diet represents what percentage change [Change%]? 10% decrease

Calculate the original value before a percentage increase, given the new value and percentage increase.

  • Budget (Pre-Raise): What was the original wedding budget [Original] before a 25% [Increase] raise made it $6,250 [New]? $5,000
  • Investment (Pre-Growth): What was the original Bitcoin investment [Original] before a 12% [Increase] growth made it worth $2,240 [New]? $2,000
  • Price Before Hike: What was the original cable TV bill [Original] before a 5% [Increase] hike made it $126 [New]? $120
  • Rent Before Hike: What was the original rent [Original] in Chicago before a 7% [Increase] hike made it $1,284 [New]? $1,200
  • Pre-Growth Population: What was the original population of Boise [Original] before a 3% [Increase] growth brought it to 103,000 [New] people? 100,000
  • Salary Before Raise: What was the original startup salary [Original] before an 8% [Increase] raise made it $54,000 [New]? $50,000
